properties.name: scim.base-path
properties.description: Base path for all SCIM 2.0 endpoints.

properties.name: scim.bulk.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM bulk operations are enabled.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-operations
properties.description: Maximum number of operations in a single bulk request.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-payload-size
properties.description: Maximum payload size in bytes for bulk requests.

properties.name: scim.filter.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM filtering is enabled.

properties.name: scim.filter.max-results
properties.description: Maximum number of results returned by a filtered query.

properties.name: scim.pagination.default-page-size
properties.description: Default page size when count is not specified.

properties.name: scim.pagination.max-page-size
properties.description: Maximum allowed page size.

properties.name: scim.etag.enabled
properties.description: Whether ETag support is enabled for optimistic concurrency.

properties.name: scim.patch.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM PATCH operations are enabled.

properties.name: scim.sort.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM sorting is enabled.

properties.name: scim.client.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the remote SCIM service provider.

properties.name: scim.client.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for the SCIM client.

properties.name: scim.client.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for the SCIM client.

properties.name: scim.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JPA-based SCIM persistence adapter is enabled.

properties.name: scim.persistence.table-name
properties.description: Name of the database table used to store SCIM resources.

properties.name: scim.persistence.schema-name
properties.description: Database schema name for the SCIM resources table.

properties.name: scim.persistence.auto-migrate
properties.description: Whether to automatically run Flyway migrations for the SCIM schema. When enabled, creates the scim_resources table on startup.

properties.name: scim.idp.provider
properties.description: Identity provider to auto-configure. Supported values: keycloak, okta, azure-ad, ping-federate, auth0.

properties.name: scim.idp.client-id
properties.description: Client ID for Keycloak client-level role extraction from the resource_access claim.

properties.name: scim.idp.namespace
properties.description: Custom namespace for Auth0 role claims (e.g., https://your-app.auth0.com).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.subject
properties.description: JWT claim name for the subject (principal identifier).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.email
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's email address.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.name
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's display name.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.roles
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's roles.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.groups
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's groups (used by Okta and PingFederate).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.realm-access
properties.description: JWT claim name for Keycloak realm-level role access.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.resource-access
properties.description: JWT claim name for Keycloak client-level resource access.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.preferred-username
properties.description: JWT claim name for the preferred username (Keycloak, Azure AD).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.given-name
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's given (first) name.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.family-name
properties.description: JWT claim name for the user's family (last) name.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.object-id
properties.description: JWT claim name for the Azure AD object identifier.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.directory-roles
properties.description: JWT claim name for Azure AD directory role identifiers (wids).

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.tenant-id
properties.description: JWT claim name for the Azure AD tenant identifier.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.app-id
properties.description: JWT claim name for the Azure AD application identifier.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.scopes
properties.description: JWT claim name for Okta scopes.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.member-of
properties.description: JWT claim name for PingFederate group membership.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.permissions
properties.description: JWT claim name for Auth0 permissions.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.nickname
properties.description: JWT claim name for Auth0 nickname.

properties.name: scim.idp.claims.picture
properties.description: JWT claim name for Auth0 profile picture URL.
